scene: Teen Byte sitting at his desk in afternoon light, waiting patiently for commits after 25 hours of inactivity, showing eager anticipation with a touch of hunger

subjects.description: Byte in teen stage form: gangly proportions, long limbs, big expressive eyes showing anticipation, slightly slumped posture from waiting, mouth in a hopeful expression
subjects.action: sitting with chin resting on hands, looking toward laptop with patient expectation

subjects.description: anchor environment: wooden desk, oversized silver laptop with glowing screen, Chicago skyline window with warm afternoon light streaming in
subjects.position: room setup with desk center, window behind left

style: pixel art, clean 2D forms, dithered shading, readable silhouette
lighting: warm golden afternoon light transitioning from morning, brighter and more insistent than pale morning glow, streaming across desk from Chicago window
mood: ecstatic but patient, hopeful anticipation, slight hunger awareness
background: wooden trophy shelf above desk with golden 10-day trophy on left and green leafy plant on right, food bowl with moderate kibble on floor to right of desk, clear spacing between all props
composition: Byte centered at desk, laptop open before him, skyline visible through window, shelf clearly above with balanced trophy and plant placement
